default_backend.description: Default search backend: searxng | brave | tavily | exa | serpapi | google | bing | http

max_download_mb.description: Streaming download cap per page in megabytes (default: 1)

max_result_length.description: Hard character cap per cleaned page (default: 8000)

search_timeout.description: Per-request timeout in seconds for fetch and search calls (default: 8)

oversampling_factor.description: Oversample multiplier: fetch results_per_query × factor candidates (default: 2)

auto_recovery_fetch.description: Replace failed fetches with reserve-pool pages (default: false)

max_total_results.description: Hard cap on total results returned per query call (default: 20)

max_query_budget.description: Total character budget across all sources in a single query (default: 32000)

max_search_queries.description: Maximum number of search queries per call, including LLM expansions (default: 5)

allowed_domains.description: Comma-separated domain allowlist — when set, only these domains pass

adaptive_budget.description: Proportional budget allocation after BM25 reranking: auto | on | off (default: auto)

adaptive_budget_fetch_factor.description: Fetch factor for adaptive budget: max_result_length × factor before trimming (default: 3)

language.description: Default language tag passed to search backends, e.g. en, it, all

bing_market.description: Bing market code, e.g. en-US, it-IT

llm_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama)

llm_api_key.description: LLM API key (leave empty for local servers such as Ollama)

llm_model.description: LLM model name, e.g. gemma3:27b, gpt-4o

llm_expansion_enabled.description: Auto-expand single queries into complementary variants via LLM (default: false)

llm_summarization_enabled.description: Include a Markdown summary with citations in query output (default: false)

llm_rerank_enabled.description: LLM-assisted reranking, BM25 always active (default: false)

llm_max_summary_words.description: Max words in the LLM summary (0 = derived automatically from budget)

llm_input_budget_factor.description: LLM input budget multiplier: max_query_budget × factor (default: 3)
